title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lovely Professional University Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lovely Professional University Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lovely Professional University Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lovely Professional University Capital India:
Lovely Professional University Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University Capital India!
